channel.title: canary-technology on errbufferoverlf.me
channel.description: Recent content in canary-technology on errbufferoverlf.me

item.title: A Brief History of Tamper Evident Locks
item.description: A talk that discussed common “canary locks” or locks with tamper evident mechanisms through the ages, Buffy trawled through 11,335,427 patents to identify several high and low profile locks and their known, or speculated bypass techniques.

item.title: Agloe: What the Map Makers of the 1930s can Teach us About Protecting our Data in 2018
item.description: What does the little town of Agloe, Colchester, NY have in common with modern day data protection? Why when I look for directions to Agloe, Colchester, NY do I only get a partial match?
